# Text Formatting
Italics    *italics* or _italics_    Underline italics    __*underline italics*__
Bold    **bold**    Underline bold    __**underline bold**__
Bold Italics    ***bold italics***    underline bold italics    __***underline bold italics***__
Underline    __underline__    Strikethrough     ~~Strikethrough~~
If you don’t want to use Markdown, you can use Code Blocks instead.

Organizational Text Formatting
This is currently an experiment and is not available on all servers at this time.
Headers
To create a header you just need to include a specific number of the hash/pound sign character (#). Use (#) for a big header, (##) for a smaller header, or (###) for an even smaller header as the first character(s) in a new line to make a header.

Masked Links
You can use masked links to make text a clickable or pressable hyperlink. To do so, you need to include the text you want displayed in brackets and then the URL in parentheses.

Lists
You can create a bulleted list using either (-) or (\*) in the beginning of each line.

You can also indent your list by adding a space before (-) or (\*) at the beginning of each line.

Code Blocks
You can make your own code blocks by wrapping your text in backticks (`).

If you want to create a multi-line code block, you can do so by wrapping your text in (\```).

Block Quotes
Another option is using block quotes. To use a block quote, you just need to put (>) at the beginning of a line of text to create a single block quote.

If you want to add multiple lines to a single block quote, just add (>>>) before the first line.

I got this info from [here](https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/210298617-Markdown-Text-101-Chat-Formatting-Bold-Italic-Underline-#h_01GY0DAWJX3CS91G9F1PPJAVBX)

Also you can use (| x2) to wrap around a text for a spoiler ||this is a spoiler|\|

# Announcing Dyno Memberships

Hey everyone,  we’re excited to introduce **Dyno Memberships** 🎉

As you may know, Dyno is used by 11M+ servers, and we’ve always wanted to keep it accessible to everyone. However the challenge is that only a small group of server owners purchase premium which pays for the development, infrastructure, and ongoing live operations.

Memberships are our way of opening that up to anyone who wants to support Dyno. As a thank you, members receive a set of exclusive profile customizations, a small xp bonus and recognition across Dyno 🙌

To get started, head to the Premium section and switch to the Membership tab. You can choose from three tiers: Silver, Gold, and Diamond.

Each tier includes exclusive profile card backgrounds you can use across any server with Dyno:

- Silver: 10 cards
- Gold: Silver + 10 additional cards
- Diamond: Gold + Silver + 10 additional cards

We’re also working on another set of 30 cards (10 per tier) coming soon, along with plans for community submissions (more details soon).

Additional benefits:

**XP Boost**
- Silver: 1%
- Gold: 2%
- Diamond: 3%

**Website recognition**: your avatar will be highlighted (top right)

**Diamond perk**: leaderboard entries are highlighted with your profile card background for extra visibility (coming soon)

We hope you enjoy this new feature, and we truly appreciate your support in helping us continue to build and improve Dyno.

You can find more information in the [documentation page](https://docs.dyno.gg/en/memberships). 

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out in the appropriate support channel.

 - Team Dyno ♥️
